---
title: "Visium HD tonsil - Struct Analysis"
author: "Samuel Gunz"
date:  last-modified
format: 
    html:
      toc: true
      self-contained: true
      highlight-style: github
      code-line-numbers: true
---

# Libraries

```{r}
#| message: true
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library("VisiumIO")
library("SpatialExperiment")
library("ggspavis")
library("SpotSweeper")
library("scuttle")
library("patchwork")
library("scran")
library("scater")
library("scrapper")
library("beachmat.hdf5")
library("dplyr")
library("SingleR")
library("celldex")
library("HCATonsilData")
library("readr")
library("sosta")
library("minerva")


theme_set(theme_bw())
set.seed(99)

# fix error in SpatialExperiment; see https://support.bioconductor.org/p/9161859/
setClassUnion("ExpData", c("matrix", "SummarizedExperiment"))
```

# Load data

```{r}
spe <- HDF5Array::loadHDF5SummarizedExperiment("../data/visium-hd-tonsil-processed")
```

## Annotation level

```{r}
ann <- read_csv("../outs/tonsil-visium-hd/sceTonsil_annotation_levels.csv")

# Map annotation level 1 to the morde detailed
map <- setNames(ann$annotation_level_1, ann$annotation_20230508)
map2 <- setNames(ann$annotation_figure_1, ann$annotation_20230508)

# Reassign
spe$LabelLevel1 <- map[spe$BanksyAnnot]
spe$LabelLevel1[is.na(spe$LabelLevel1)] <- "unknown"
# Reassign
spe$LabelFig1 <- map2[spe$BanksyAnnot]
spe$LabelFig1[is.na(spe$LabelFig1)] <- "unknown"
```


```{r}
data.frame(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe)) |> 
ggplot(aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, col=BanksyAnnot)) +
    geom_point(shape=16, stroke=0, size=0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = unname(pals::cols25(13))) +
    coord_equal() + theme_void() +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=8)))

data.frame(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe)) |> 
ggplot(aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, col=LabelLevel1)) +
    geom_point(shape=16, stroke=0, size=0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = unname(pals::kelly(15))) +
    coord_equal() + theme_void() +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=8)))

data.frame(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe)) |> 
ggplot(aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, col=LabelFig1)) +
    geom_point(shape=16, stroke=0, size=0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = unname(pals::kelly(15))) +
    coord_equal() + theme_void() +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=8)))

ggsave("../outs/figs/tonsil-annot.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
```


# Reconstruct GCs

```{r}
n <- shapeIntensityImage(
  spe,
  marks = "LabelFig1",
  imageCol = "sample_id",
  imageId = "sample01",
  markSelect = c("GCBC", "Activated NBC")
)

n
```


```{r}
gcs <- reconstructShapeDensitySPE(spe, marks = "LabelFig1",
                             imageCol = "sample_id",
                             markSelect = c("GCBC", "Activated NBC"),
                             thres = 3E-4)

gcs <- sfheaders::sf_remove_holes(gcs)
```


```{r}
data.frame(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe)) |> 
ggplot(aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, col=LabelFig1)) +
    geom_point(shape=16, stroke=0, size=0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = unname(pals::kelly(10))) +
    coord_equal() + theme_void() +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=8))) +
        geom_sf(
        data = gcs,
        fill = NA,
        color = "black",
        inherit.aes = FALSE, # this is important
        linewidth = 0.75
    )
```

```{r}
krts <- rowData(spe)[, "geneName"][grep("KRT", rowData(spe)[, "geneName"])]
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8
plotSpots(spe, annotate = "KRT14",
          feature_names = "geneName",
          assay_name = "logcounts",
          y_reverse = FALSE) + 
  geom_sf(data = gcs, fill = NA, color = "darkblue",
          alpha = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5,
          point_size = 0.01)
```


```{r}
assign <- assingCellsToStructures(spe, gcs,
    imageCol = "sample_id", nCores = 4
)

spe$gcAssign <- assign
```

```{r}
cbind(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe)) |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    ggplot(aes(x = pxl_col_in_fullres, y = pxl_row_in_fullres, color = gcAssign)) +
    geom_point(size = 0.25) +
    coord_equal()
```
# Shape metrics

```{r}
library("sf")
res <- shapeMetrics(st_as_sfc(gcs))
gcs <- cbind(gcs, res)
```

```{r}
hist(log10(res$Area))
```


# Reference Axes

```{r}
rects <- st_minimum_rotated_rectangle(gcs)

ggplot() + 
  geom_sf(data = gcs, fill = NA, color = "darkblue",
          alpha = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5) +
      geom_sf(data = rects, fill = NA, color = "black",
          alpha = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5)

```

# Reference from Mantel


```{r}
# NOTE: fails when NA in marks
findCenterCoord <- function(spe, m, mark, targetMark) {
  # select centroids that fit the target mark
  sel <- spatialCoords(spe[,m])[colData(spe[,m])[[mark]] == targetMark,]
  centers <- sel |> colMeans()

  return(c(centers[1], centers[2]))
}
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 15
#| fig-height: 15

gcs_sel <- gcs[st_area(gcs) > 10^5,]

plot(gcs_sel[,1])
dfTxt <- st_centroid(gcs) |> st_geometry() |> st_coordinates() |> as.data.frame()
dfTxt$structID <- gcs$structID

ggplot() + 
  geom_sf(data = gcs, fill = NA, color = "darkblue",
          alpha = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = dfTxt, aes(x = X, y = Y, label = structID))
```


```{r}
intersections <- sf::st_intersects(st_as_sf(
    as.data.frame(spatialCoords(spe)),
    coords = c("pxl_col_in_fullres", "pxl_row_in_fullres")
), gcs_sel, sparse = FALSE)

```

```{r}
GCBCcenter <- apply(intersections, 2, function(x) findCenterCoord(spe, x, "LabelFig1", "GCBC"))
GCBCcenter <- t(GCBCcenter)
colnames(GCBCcenter) <- c("x", "y")
```



```{r}
intersectionsMZ <- sf::st_intersects(st_as_sf(
    as.data.frame(spatialCoords(spe)),
    coords = c("pxl_col_in_fullres", "pxl_row_in_fullres")
), gcs_sel,
sparse = FALSE)

Mantelcenter <- apply(intersectionsMZ, 2, function(x) findCenterCoord(spe, x, "LabelFig1", "Activated NBC"))
Mantelcenter <- t(Mantelcenter)
colnames(Mantelcenter) <- c("x", "y")
```



```{r}
ggplot()+
  geom_sf(data = gcs_sel, fill = NA, color = "navy",
          alpha = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
      guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size= 1 , alpha = 1))) +
  geom_point(data = GCBCcenter, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "yellow", size = 1) +
  geom_point(data = Mantelcenter, aes(x = x, y = y), color = "orange", size = 1) +
    theme_bw()
```

```{r}
# a function to calculate gradients for all objects
calculateLine <- function(coords, geom) {
  
  # fit a linear model
  mod <- lm(y ~ x, coords)
  
  # predict new data
  new_data <- data.frame(x = c(st_bbox(geom)$xmin, st_bbox(geom)$xmax))
  ynew <- predict(mod, new_data)
  
  # create a new line
  new_data$y <- ynew
  newline <- st_linestring(as.matrix(new_data))
  
  return(newline)
}
```

```{r}
# Use apply to claculate line segment for all geoms
# Initialize an empty sf object
lines <- c()

for (i in 1:nrow(gcs_sel)) {
  coords <- rbind(Mantelcenter[i,], GCBCcenter[i,]) |> as.data.frame()
  line <- calculateLine(coords, gcs_sel[i,])
  lines <- c(lines, st_sfc(st_intersection(line, gcs_sel[i,])))
}
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 10

df <- cbind(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe))

df <- df |> 
    as.data.frame() |> 
    mutate(LabelFig1New = case_when(LabelFig1 == "GCBC" ~ "GCBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "Activated NBC" ~ "Activated NBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "NBC" ~ "NBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "epithelial" ~ "epithelial",
                                    .default = "other"))

r1 <- ggplot() +
      ggrastr::rasterise(geom_point(
        aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, col = LabelFig1New),
        shape = 16,
        stroke = 0,
        size = 0.2,
        data = df
    ), dpi = 300) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("dodgerblue3", "seagreen2", "gold", "skyblue3", "plum3")) +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1 , alpha = 2))) +
    geom_sf(data = st_sfc(lines),
            color = "gray95",
            linewidth = 0.8) +
        geom_sf(
        data = gcs_sel,
        fill = NA,
        color = "black",
        alpha = 0.5,
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        linewidth = 0.6
    ) +
    geom_point(data = GCBCcenter,
               aes(x = x, y = y),
               color = "orangered2",
               shape = 15,
               size = 0.8) +
    geom_point(data = Mantelcenter,
               aes(x = x, y = y),
               color = "mediumpurple2",
               shape = 15,
               size = 0.8) +
    theme_void() +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=8))) +
    labs(color = "")

r1
#ggsave("../outs/figs/tonsil-axes.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
```
```{r}
Mantels_sf <- st_as_sf(as.data.frame(Mantelcenter), coords = c("x", "y"))

anchors <- c()

for (i in 1:nrow(gcs_sel)) {
  anchors <- c(anchors, 
               st_cast(st_sfc(lines)[i,], "POINT")[
                   st_distance(st_cast(st_sfc(lines)[i,], "POINT"),
                               Mantels_sf[i,]) %>% which.min()])
}
```
```{r}
ggplot() +
    geom_sf(
        data = gcs_sel,
        fill = NA,
        color = "navy",
        alpha = 0.5,
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        linewidth = 1
    ) +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1 , alpha = 1))) +
    geom_sf(data = st_sfc(lines),
            color = "purple3",
            linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(data = GCBCcenter,
               aes(x = x, y = y),
               color = "yellow",
               size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = Mantelcenter,
               aes(x = x, y = y),
               color = "orange",
               size = 1) +
    geom_sf(data = st_sfc(anchors),
            color = "red2",
            linewidth = 1) +
    theme_bw()
```


```{r}
st_perpendicular_line <- function(endpoint, line){
    # Define endpoints
    endpoint <- st_coordinates(endpoint)
    
    # Extract coordinates
    coords <- st_coordinates(line)

    # Calculate perpendicular direction
    dx <- coords[2, 1] - coords[1, 1] # Change in x
    dy <- coords[2, 2] - coords[1, 2] # Change in y
    
    # Perpendicular vector
    perp_dx <- -dy
    perp_dy <- dx
    
    # New line perpendicular from endpoint
    new_coords <- matrix(c(endpoint[1] + 0.5 * perp_dx, endpoint[2] + 0.5 * perp_dy,
                           endpoint[1] - 0.5 * perp_dx, endpoint[2] - 0.5 * perp_dy), 
                         ncol = 2, byrow = TRUE)
    
    return(st_linestring(new_coords))
}


new_lines <- c()

for (i in 1:nrow(gcs_sel)) {
    new_lines <- c(new_lines, st_sfc(st_perpendicular_line(st_sfc(anchors)[i,], st_sfc(lines)[i,])))

}

new_lines <- st_sfc(new_lines)
```

```{r}
ggplot() +
    geom_sf(
        data = gcs_sel,
        fill = NA,
        color = "navy",
        alpha = 0.5,
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        linewidth = 1
    ) +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 1 , alpha = 1))) +
    geom_sf(data = st_sfc(lines),
            color = "purple3",
            linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(data = GCBCcenter,
               aes(x = x, y = y),
               color = "yellow",
               size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = Mantelcenter,
               aes(x = x, y = y),
               color = "orange",
               size = 1) +
    geom_sf(data = st_sfc(anchors),
            color = "red2",
            linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = new_lines, color = "seagreen", linewidth = 1)
```

## Calculate distances

```{r}
colData(spe)$mantel_anchor_dist <- NA
colData(spe)$mantel_anchor_dist_norm <- NA

for (i in 1:nrow(gcs_sel)) {
    log1 <- st_intersects(st_as_sf(as.data.frame(spatialCoords(spe)),
                           coords = c("pxl_col_in_fullres",
                                      "pxl_row_in_fullres")), gcs_sel[i,], sparse = FALSE)
    
    dist1 <- st_distance(st_as_sf(as.data.frame(spatialCoords(spe[,log1])),
                           coords = c("pxl_col_in_fullres",
                                      "pxl_row_in_fullres")),  new_lines[[i]])
    
    colData(spe[,log1])$mantel_anchor_dist <- dist1
    colData(spe[,log1])$mantel_anchor_dist_norm <- dist1 / max(dist1)
}
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8
df <- cbind(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe))

df <- df |> 
    as.data.frame() |> 
    mutate(LabelFig1New = case_when(LabelFig1 == "GCBC" ~ "GCBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "Activated NBC" ~ "Activated NBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "NBC" ~ "NBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "epithelial" ~ "epithelial",
                                    .default = "other")) |> 
    filter(!is.na(mantel_anchor_dist_norm)) |> 
    mutate(mantel_anchor_dist_norm = as.numeric(mantel_anchor_dist_norm))

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, color = mantel_anchor_dist_norm),
    shape = 16,
    stroke = 0,
    size = 0.9,
    data = df
  ) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "gray99", high = "blue3") +
  geom_sf(
    data = gcs_sel,
    fill = NA,
    color = "navy",
    alpha = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 1
  ) +
  geom_sf(data = st_sfc(lines),
          color = "gold",
          linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = new_lines,
          color = "seagreen",
          linewidth = 1) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(color = "norm.\ndistance")


ggsave("../outs/figs/tonsil-axes-dist.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
```
# Pseudobulk / aggregate counts

```{r}
spe$binned_dist <- as.factor(cut(spe$mantel_anchor_dist_norm, breaks = 30))
spe_sel <- spe[,!is.na(spe$binned_dist)]
lev <- combineFactors(spe_sel$binned_dist, keep.unused = FALSE)
```


## Select Germinal centers with NBC and GCBC clusters

```{r}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 12
dfTxt <- st_centroid(gcs) |> st_geometry() |> st_coordinates() |> as.data.frame()
dfTxt$structID <- gcs$structID

data.frame(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe)) |> 
ggplot(aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, col=LabelFig1)) +
    geom_point(shape=16, stroke=0, size=0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = unname(pals::kelly(10))) +
    coord_equal() + theme_void() +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=8))) +
        geom_sf(
        data = gcs,
        fill = NA,
        color = "black",
        inherit.aes = FALSE, # this is important
        linewidth = 0.75
    ) + 
  geom_sf(data = gcs, fill = NA, color = "darkblue",
          alpha = 0.5, inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(data = dfTxt, aes(x = X, y = Y, label = structID),
            inherit.aes = FALSE)
```
```{r}
sel_gc <- c("sample01_1", "sample01_4", "sample01_6", "sample01_10",
            "sample01_11","sample01_12", "sample01_21", "sample01_22", "sample01_24", "sample01_26", "sample01_30", "sample01_31", "sample01_32", "sample01_35", "sample01_39", "sample01_40")
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 12
dfTxt <- st_centroid(gcs) |> st_geometry() |> st_coordinates() |> as.data.frame()
dfTxt$structID <- gcs$structID

pp <- data.frame(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe)) |> 
ggplot(aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, col=LabelFig1)) +
    geom_point(shape=16, stroke=0, size=0.8) +
    scale_color_manual(values = unname(pals::kelly(10))) +
    coord_equal() + theme_void() +
    guides(colour = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size=8))) +
        geom_sf(
        data = gcs[gcs$structID %in% sel_gc,],
        fill = NA,
        color = "black",
        inherit.aes = FALSE, # this is important
        linewidth = 1
    ) + 
  geom_text(data = dfTxt, aes(x = X, y = Y, label = structID),
            inherit.aes = FALSE)
```
```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8
df <- cbind(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe))

idx <- gcs_sel$structID %in% sel_gc

df <- df |> 
    as.data.frame() |> 
    mutate(LabelFig1New = case_when(LabelFig1 == "GCBC" ~ "GCBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "Activated NBC" ~ "Activated NBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "NBC" ~ "NBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "epithelial" ~ "epithelial",
                                    .default = "other")) |> 
    filter(!is.na(mantel_anchor_dist_norm)) |> 
    mutate(mantel_anchor_dist_norm = as.numeric(mantel_anchor_dist_norm)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(gcAssign %in% sel_gc)

ggplot() +
    ggrastr::rasterise(geom_point(
    aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, color = mantel_anchor_dist_norm),
    shape = 16,
    stroke = 0,
    size = 0.2,
    data = df
  ), dpi = 300) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "gray99", high = "blue3") +
    geom_sf(data = st_sfc(lines)[idx,],
          color = "gold",
          linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_sf(
    data = gcs_sel[idx,],
    fill = NA,
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  # geom_sf(data = new_lines[idx,],
  #         color = "seagreen3",
  #         linewidth = 1.25) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(color = "norm.\ndistance") -> r2

r2
#ggsave("../outs/figs/tonsil-axes-sel-dist.pdf", width = 10, height = 8)
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 8
df <- cbind(colData(spe), spatialCoords(spe))

idx <- gcs_sel$structID %in% sel_gc

df <- df |> 
    as.data.frame() |> 
    mutate(LabelFig1New = case_when(LabelFig1 == "GCBC" ~ "GCBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "Activated NBC" ~ "Activated NBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "NBC" ~ "NBC",
                                    LabelFig1 == "epithelial" ~ "epithelial",
                                    .default = "other")) |> 
    filter(!is.na(mantel_anchor_dist_norm)) |> 
    mutate(mantel_anchor_dist_norm = as.numeric(mantel_anchor_dist_norm)) |> 
  dplyr::filter(gcAssign %in% sel_gc) |> 
  dplyr::filter(binned_dist == "(0.967,1]")

pp2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(pxl_col_in_fullres, pxl_row_in_fullres, color = mantel_anchor_dist_norm),
    shape = 16,
    stroke = 0,
    size = 0.9,
    data = df
  ) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "blue1", high = "blue3") +
  geom_sf(
    data = gcs_sel[idx,],
    fill = NA,
    color = "black",
    alpha = 0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    linewidth = 0.25
  ) 
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 20
#| fig-height: 12
pp + pp2
```


```{r}
spe_sel <- spe[,!is.na(spe$binned_dist)]
spe_sel_orient <- spe_sel[, spe_sel$gcAssign %in% sel_gc]
```


```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
spe_agg_selorient <- scrapper::aggregateAcrossCells(
  logcounts(spe_sel_orient),
  list(bins = spe_sel_orient$binned_dist),
  num.threads = 1
)
saveRDS(spe_agg_selorient, "../data/spe_agg_binned_dist_select.rds")
```


```{r}
spe_agg_selorient <- readRDS("../data/spe_agg_binned_dist_select.rds")
```


```{r}
aggMatorient <- apply(spe_agg_selorient$sums, 1, \(x) x / spe_agg_selorient$counts) |> t()
```


```{r}
#| warning: false
res_MICorient <- apply(aggMatorient, 1, function(x)
    mine(x,c(1:ncol(aggMatorient)))$MIC)

res_MASorient <- apply(aggMatorient, 1, function(x)
    mine(x,c(1:ncol(aggMatorient)))$MAS)
```



```{r}
genes_interest_MICorient <- res_MICorient[order(res_MICorient, decreasing = TRUE)] %>% names()
genes_interest_MASorient <- res_MASorient[order(res_MASorient, decreasing = TRUE)] %>% names()

sel <- names(res_MICorient[res_MICorient > 0.99])
sortG <- sort(rowSums(aggMatorient), decreasing = TRUE) |> names()
sel <- sortG[sortG %in% sel][1:25]
```

```{r}
mic_res <- res_MICorient
names(mic_res) <- rowData(spe)[names(mic_res), "geneName"]
```


```{r}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 6

m <- aggMatorient[sel,]
rownames(m) <- rowData(spe)[sel, "geneName"]

colnames(m) <- spe_agg_selorient$combinations |> unlist()

ph <- pheatmap::pheatmap(t(m),
                   #color = colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(n = 7, name = "RdYl"))),
                   cluster_rows = FALSE,
                   
                   treeheight_row = 0,
                   treeheight_col = 0,
                   colorRampPalette(c("deepskyblue2", "white", "purple2"))(100),
                   scale = "column")
ph
#ggsave("../outs/figs/tonsil-axes-mic-orient-select.pdf", ph, width = 6, height = 4)
```

## More genes

```{r}
genes_interest_MICorient <- res_MICorient[order(res_MICorient, decreasing = TRUE)] %>% names()
genes_interest_MASorient <- res_MASorient[order(res_MASorient, decreasing = TRUE)] %>% names()

sel <- names(res_MICorient[res_MICorient > 0.99])
sortG <- sort(rowSums(aggMatorient), decreasing = TRUE) |> names()
```

```{r}
mic_res <- res_MICorient
names(mic_res) <- rowData(spe)[names(mic_res), "geneName"]
```


```{r}
sel <- names(res_MICorient[res_MICorient > 0.999])
length(sel)
```
```{r}
rowData(spe_sel_orient)[, "geneName"][grep("^IGK|JCHAIN|HLA", rowData(spe_sel_orient)[, "geneName"])]
```
```{r}
rowData(spe_sel_orient)[, "geneName"][grep("MIC", rowData(spe_sel_orient)[, "geneName"])]
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 5
library("ComplexHeatmap")
sortG <- sort(rowSums(aggMatorient), decreasing = TRUE) |> names()

m <- aggMatorient[sel,]
rownames(m) <- rowData(spe_sel_orient)[sel, "geneName"]

colnames(m) <- round(seq(from = 0, to = 1, length.out = 30),2)
colnames(m) <- rep("", 30)
colnames(m)[1] <- "LZ"
colnames(m)[30] <- "DZ"

sel1 <- c("IGHD", "COTL1", "IGHM", "CIITA", "HLA-DPA1", "CD83",
          "CRIIP1","IGHA1", "MKI67", "TUBB", "TUBB4B", "TOP2A", "MHC1",
          "IGKC", "IGIP", "IGHA2", "IGHG1", "TUBB2A", "TUBB4B", "SRGN",
          "JCHAIN", "MICA", "MICB", "PSMB10")


gene_names <- rownames(m)
col_labels <- ifelse(gene_names %in% sel1, gene_names, "")

# Scale gene expression
mat_scaled <- t(scale(t(m)))
mat_t <- t(mat_scaled)

highlight_idx <- which(colnames(mat_t) %in% sel1)
gen <- colnames(mat_t)[highlight_idx]

# Create the heatmap
Heatmap(mat_t,
        show_row_names = TRUE,
        show_column_names = FALSE,  
        top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotation(
          labels = anno_mark(at = highlight_idx,
                             labels = gen,
                             labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
        ),
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = TRUE,
        show_column_dend = FALSE,
        col = circlize::colorRamp2(c(-2, 0, 2), c("deepskyblue2", "white", "purple2")),
        heatmap_legend_param = list(title = "z-scaled\nmean expr.")) -> r3
r3
```

```{r}
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 8

library("patchwork")
rsub <- r1 + r2

ggsave("../misc/rsub.pdf", plot = rsub, width = 8, height = 3.5)
```


# Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
